name: Pirate Island
author: Poki
description: Pirate Island is a craft game where you, as a stranded pilot, must escape from a resource-rich island after your plane crashes. Start by gathering resources from scratch—chop trees to build a tent, clear paths to find pirates for trades, and acquire handy tools to collect fish and other resources. But remember, your energy is limited. Resting is crucial, so always return to your tent when tired and improve your health with the coins you earn. How quickly can you gather everything you need and find your way off the island? How to play Pirate Island? Tap or click on any object to get or use it. Who created Pirate Island? Pirate Island is created by Mnogoigrovka. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Pirate Island for free? You can play Pirate Island for free on Poki. Can I play Pirate Island on mobile devices and desktop? Pirate Island can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
